arts.ttl: English media: Feyenoord meeting important moment for Manchester City
arts.sum: Manchester City have not won their last five matches and tricky European meetings with Juventus and PSG await after Feyenoord challenge.

arts.ttl: Man City already have the template to follow to ease Erling Haaland burden
arts.sum: City have become too over-reliant on Erling Haaland for goals but they scored plenty prior to his arrival

arts.ttl: Brian Priske on coach Etiënne Rijnen: the ‘Future of Dutch football’
arts.sum: Feyenoord boss Brian Priske has been full of praise for his set piece specialist coach Etiënne Rijnen, reports Voetbal International.

arts.ttl: Tottenham star confirms he suffered broken ankle in Man City thumping
arts.sum: Guglielmo Vicario played on for an hour after suffering the injury at the Etihad Stadium.

arts.ttl: Liverpool are in control but eight-point gap isn’t even Man City’s biggest problem
arts.sum: The Reds face Man City next with Pep’s team losing their last three in the Premier League

arts.ttl: How to watch Man City vs Feyenoord Champions League clash for free
arts.sum: Manchester City are looking to end their run of five consecutive defeats on Tuesday night against Feyenoord in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Why Man United should throw their money at the £100million 'monster' who destroyed Man City and is ready to tear down Arsenal tonight
arts.sum: TOM COLLOMOSSE: 'This guy' was Viktor Gyokeres, one of the most prolific forwards in the world and a possible target for Man United, following his former boss Ruben Amorim to Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: City v Feyenoord programme: Foden focus, Pep signs, Rodri returns and KDB interview
arts.sum: We have the usual favourites like Pep Guardiola ’s manager notes, Mike Summerbee’s Buzzer column and a focus on the visitors, Feyenoord. We also look at the news this past week that manager Pep Guardiola has signed a new contract while we have pictures of Rodri returning to Manchester for a huge homecoming before our last game.

arts.ttl: Noel Gallagher makes Liverpool vs Man City prediction and surprising Mohamed Salah wish
arts.sum: Manchester City face Liverpool on Sunday in a clash with huge implications on this season's Premier League title race, and celebrity fan Noel Gallagher has given his prediction

arts.ttl: Guardiola not for changing despite Man City crisis
arts.sum: Man City boss Pep Guardiola says it is tough for his players to "defend a legacy" and questions why he should change his tactics despite the club's dip in form.
